client_id.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client ID for the refresh-token grant. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client secret (optional for some client types). Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived Google OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it).

base_url.description: YouTube Reporting API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: Google OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. MUST be https in production; the hook fails closed on a non-https or unparseable value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token/client secret to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

scopes.description: OAuth scope requested on the token-refresh grant.

content_owner_id.description: Optional content-owner ID; sent as the onBehalfOfContentOwner query parameter for content-owner-scoped accounts.

job_id.description: Reporting job ID the 'reports' stream is scoped to (required only when reading the reports stream).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
